name: recall-vscode
description: Feeds your editing activity into Recall's local memory. File opens and saves go to the daemon on 127.0.0.1 — nothing leaves the machine.

recall.enabled.description: Capture file opens and saves into Recall's local memory (~/.recall/events).

recall.endpoint.description: The local Recall daemon. Loopback only — the companion never talks to any other host.
